experiences.name: Vesuvius: Skip The Line Ticket
experiences.description:
Explore Mount Vesuvius and witness the scenic views of Pompeii and the Gulf of Naples. With this skip-the-line ticket, prepare for an exciting adventure with an informative audio guide included. If you prefer, opt for a hassle-free bus transfer from Naples.

Go on a scenic hike at your own pace. Learn about the rich history and mysteries of this world-famous volcano as you walk along the trail. The audio guide offers all the information and knowledge about the volcano. Make sure to download everything beforehand, as Wi-Fi isn't available at the ruins and museums.
